scripts.build:services: npm run build --workspace=services/venue-service && npm run build --workspace=services/booking-service && npm run build --workspace=services/people-service && npm run build --workspace=services/membership-service && npm run build --workspace=services/coaching-service && npm run build --workspace=services/team-service
scripts.start:services: concurrently --names "venue,booking,people,membership,coaching,team" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red" "node services/venue-service/dist/main.js" "node services/booking-service/dist/main.js" "node services/people-service/dist/main.js" "node services/membership-service/dist/main.js" "node services/coaching-service/dist/main.js" "node services/team-service/dist/main.js"
scripts.start:all: concurrently --names "venue,booking,people,membership,coaching,team,portal" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white" "node services/venue-service/dist/main.js" "node services/booking-service/dist/main.js" "node services/people-service/dist/main.js" "node services/membership-service/dist/main.js" "node services/coaching-service/dist/main.js" "node services/team-service/dist/main.js" "npm run dev --workspace=admin-portal"
